---
date: last-modified
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
---

# Introduction

*Last updated: {{< meta date >}}*

This book documents CanadaLogin metrics and the tables they are calculated from.

It has two chapters:

- The [Metrics Cookbook](cookbook/index.qmd) defines commonly used metrics,
  including their calculation logic and example SQL queries.
- The [Data Catalog](catalog/index.qmd) describes the underlying tables, field
  by field.
